title: Graveyard Entry
description: Machine-readable record of one eliminated edge-research candidate. Negative-knowledge registry (RR-Y1-015). Records existing FAIL knowledge only; introduces no new edge metric and revives no candidate (DEC-053/DISC-9 spirit).

candidate_id.description: Stable kebab/snake id, e.g. hi52, viop_ssf_oi_k2, index_recon_xu030_in.

axis.description: Elimination axis. 'infrastructure-law' = graveyard code that produced a permanent design invariant rather than an edge verdict (e.g. PM-1).

directive_refs.description: Directive / research IDs (D-NNN, NRR-NNN, RR-Y1-NNN). At least one required.

pr_refs.description: GitHub PR numbers that merged the artifact (e.g. '#172'). Empty if not located in master history.

verdict.description: Recorded verdict, verbatim taxonomy used across the project.

deployable.description: Whether the candidate is deployable as an edge. false for every eliminated candidate; null/omitted for LAW-PRODUCING and PENDING.

name.description: Metric that carried the verdict, e.g. NW-t (cost-free gate2), FE-within-beta, KB1 NW-t.

value.description: Recorded value. Number when recorded; the literal string 'NOT-RECORDED' when no metric exists in the artifacts.

threshold.description: Keep-bar threshold the metric was judged against (number) or 'NOT-APPLICABLE'.

note.description: Optional one-line clarification (e.g. illiquid-driven ALL-universe statistic vs deployable liquid).

why.description: FAIL mechanism, single honest paragraph. No softening, no fabrication.

graveyard_doc.description: Path to the dedicated graveyard markdown, or null if none exists.

stage0_json.description: Path to the pre-registered Stage-0 JSON, or null.

results_json.description: Path to the recorded results JSON, or null.

code_modules.description: Strangler-isolated code modules (read-only; never deleted/modified by this task).

test_modules.description: Committed test modules that pin this candidate's harness/verdict logic.

reproducible.description: Reproducibility status. VERIFIED = committed determinism/harness tests pass. STALE = recorded result no longer reproduces (code-drift finding; verdict unchanged). NO-FIXTURE = no committed deterministic vector / input data git-ignored. NOT-CHECKED = not evaluated.

reproducible_note.description: What exactly was (or could not be) reproduced.

session_closed.description: Session label at closure (e.g. S#15) or null if not labeled in master.

dec_ref.description: Architectural decision id (DEC-NNN). May reference a decision not yet merged to master (flagged in consistency audit).

revival_status.description: PERMANENT = revival forbidden (post-hoc chain blocked / no clean X_2). save/wait = eliminated in current universe but a future clean regime/universe could re-warrant a fresh Stage-0. N/A = law or active research.
